eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 10:53 AM on SEP 27, 2019 Effective until 8:53 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Silver Alert has been issued for Chandler Police Department.  This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Chandler Police Department is looking for Eron Stewart a female. Last seen on foot wearing  blue, teal and purple sheep pajamas. If you have contact with the Silver Alert, Please call 9 1 1.  Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
